subject: [VID] Update certificate
commit_message:
[VID] Update certificate

Update certificate in order to have one with one year.

Issue-ID: VID-959
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I4647a42d26777b4c35d738cd3e372c0c3a47a92d
